# Daniel Allen

> Software developer building practical, data-driven and AI-assisted systems.
> Based in Australia. Projects in C++, Node.js, Vue and Android, each with
> automated tests and written documentation.

Every page of this site is prerendered to static HTML, so its content is readable
without executing JavaScript.

## Pages

- [Home](https://danielallen.com.au/): what I build and how I approach it
- [About](https://danielallen.com.au/about): background, and the route into software
- [Portfolio](https://danielallen.com.au/portfolio): selected projects with links to source

## Selected work

- [llm-anonymizer](https://github.com/daniel-p-allen/llm-anonymizer): C++ desktop tool
  that strips personal details from email before a language model sees it, then puts
  them back afterwards. 40 automated tests including a byte-for-byte round trip.
- [grocery-management-system](https://github.com/daniel-p-allen/grocery-management-system):
  Arduino keypad, Node services and MongoDB turning product scans into stock levels and
  a shopping list. 56 black-box tests that drive the real services.
- [Daniel-Allen-Website](https://github.com/daniel-p-allen/Daniel-Allen-Website): this
  site. Vue 3 and Vite, prerendered, 58 tests.
- [LLM-Powered-Quiz-App](https://github.com/daniel-p-allen/LLM-Powered-Quiz-App):
  Android client and Flask backend against a Hugging Face model.
- [NewsAppFinal](https://github.com/daniel-p-allen/NewsAppFinal): full stack news and
  newsletter application with Stripe payments.

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/daniel-p-allen
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/danielpeterallen/
